zh.lifeSummary: 當Tiedberge von Rheinfelden於1006年出生在瑞士波格a特爾時，她的父親Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden41歲，母親Richilde Von Schwaben16歲。她和Baron Adalbert of Grandson II至少有6個兒子。她去世於1050年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Tiedberge von Rheinfelden于1006年出生在瑞士波格a特爾时，她的父亲Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden41岁，母亲Richilde Von Schwaben16岁。她和Baron Adalbert of Grandson II至少有6个儿子。她去世于1050年之后。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: Jonathan
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Tiedberge von Rheinfelden was born in 1006, in Neuchâtel, Neuchâtel, Switzerland, her father, Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden, was 41 and her mother, Richilde Von Schwaben, was 16. She had at least 6 sons with Baron Adalbert of Grandson II. She died after 1050.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Tiedberge von Rheinfelden est née en 1006, à Neuchâtel, Canton de Neuchâtel, Suisse, son père, Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Richilde Von Schwaben, avait 16 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils avec Baron Adalbert of Grandson II. Elle est décédée après 1050.

de.lifeSummary: Als Tiedberge von Rheinfelden 1006 in Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Schweiz geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden 41 und ihre Mutter Richilde Von Schwaben 16. Sie hatte mit Baron Adalbert of Grandson II mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1050.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Tiedberge von Rheinfelden è nata il nel 1006 nel Neuchâtel, Neuchâtel, Svizzera, sua padre, Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Richilde Von Schwaben, aveva 16 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli con Baron Adalbert of Grandson II. Morì dopo il 1050.

ja.lifeSummary: Tiedberge von Rheinfeldenが1006年にスイスネウエンブルグネウチaテルで生まれた時，父Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfeldenは41歳，母Richilde Von Schwabenは16歳であった。彼女はBaron Adalbert of Grandson IIとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1050年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Tiedberge von Rheinfelden(이)가 1006년 스위스 니우버그 니우cha텔에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Richilde Von Schwaben(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 Baron Adalbert of Grandson II(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1050년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Tiedberge von Rheinfelden nasceu em 1006, em Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Suiça, seu pai, Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Richilde Von Schwaben, tinha 16 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Baron Adalbert of Grandson II. Ela faleceu após 1050.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Tiedberge von Rheinfelden родилась в 1006 г. в местности неучaтел, неуенбург, Швейцария, её отцу по имени Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Richilde Von Schwaben, 16. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Baron Adalbert of Grandson II. Она умерла после 1050 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Tiedberge von Rheinfelden nació en 1006, en Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Suiza, su papá, Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Richilde Von Schwaben, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos con Baron Adalbert of Grandson II. Murió después de 1050.
